title: The Winter.
description: Survive the frost. Dread the shadows. A horror survival experience.
body:
Note: I am currently making a new version of this. This one is not very good. The new one will have better optimization, better mods, and better quality of life.

The Winter is a cold, atmospheric horror modpack designed to chill you to the bone. Haunting cryptids, frozen wastelands, and psychological dread await in this modpack inspired by bleak Eastern horror. Featuring mods like Pale Hound, The Graveyard, Goatman, and The Man From The Fog, this pack mixes ambient terror with survival pressure to keep you constantly on edge.

Features:

Cold biome survival with harsh temperature mechanics

Multiple stalker and cryptid-style enemies

Ambience-driven horror (custom footsteps, eerie sounds)

High tension exploration, light lore, and minimal guidance
